chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1924 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Before; Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui. Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah. 1. For orders on M.A. No.7331/2022. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.7332/2022. 4. For orders on M.A. No.7333/2022. 5. For hearing of main case. 01.06.2022 Mr. Shoukat Ali Pathan, Advocate for the petitioner. == Urgency is granted. The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for direction against the officials respondents for reconstruction of revenue record of his missing survey numbers and demarcation of his holding and to issue fresh map and copies of record of rights. The direction sought for by the petitioner could not be issued by this Court in exercise of its writ jurisdiction simply for the reason that it is involving factual controversy and same could only be resolved after recording of evidence; consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with the listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Muhammad Danish*
